title: Christian Napolitano Portfolio
description: Design and development of the personal portfolio website for Christian Napolitano.
longDescription: Full design and development of Christian's portfolio. The site was built with a strong focus on animation: scroll-driven reveals, smooth transitions, and hover interactions all made with GSAP. The goal was to let the photography speak, with a clean layout, a lot of whitespace and minimal UI.

title: Quiz Royale
description: Online educational video game with multiple-choice quizzes in RPG style on a website.
longDescription: A quiz game with a retro RPG feel. Students answer multiple-choice questions to earn XP and level up, with health bars, animated battle transitions, and category-based progression. Kept lightweight with Alpine.js (no heavy framework) to run fast even on school computers.

title: Champagne League
description: Development of the brand identity and website for a futsal tournament.
longDescription: Brand identity and website for a futsal tournament, built from scratch. Logo, colors, typography; then the full site: standings, match results, fixtures, and team pages. The visual direction mixes the refined look of champagne branding with the energy of competitive sport.

title: FilmFlix
description: An application that allows you to search for your favorite movies and discover information about them.
longDescription: A movie search app with a personal library. You can look up any film and get all the info: cast, ratings, synopsis, trailer. With a free account you can save films to a watchlist and rate them. Auth and data storage are handled with Firebase.

title: Pokédex
description: A web application that allows users to search and explore information about Pokémon from the Pokédex of Kanto.
longDescription: A Pokédex for the original 151 Pokémon. Browse the full list, filter by type, or search by name and number. Each page shows stats, the evolution chain, type matchups, and moves. All data is fetched live from the PokéAPI.
